"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"🤖 AI 大模型动态","style":["bold"]}], [{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• MiniMax M2.7 模型在 Vertex AI 平台上线"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• 海螺AI发布AI视频重打光工具 Light Studio"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• Meta AI 研究突破：无监督视频学习获得物体恒存性"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• Nemotron-Cascade 2 模型发布"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• Jas Sekhon 加入 Google DeepMind 担任首席战略官"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"💻 科技行业热点","style":["bold"]}], [{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• 华为将发布首款风冷散热手机"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• 雷军官宣：Xiaomi MiMo 首周限免开放"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• 网易云音乐接入 OpenClaw"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• LiblibAI 发布 AI 视频创作平台 LibTV"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• 亚马逊开发 AI 智能手机"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• 国家级电力人工智能中试基地迎首批企业"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"

"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"🔧 编程与开发资讯","style":["bold"]}], [{"tag":"text","text":"

"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• NVIDIA GTC 2026 大会落幕"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• StanfordNLP 发布 Stanza-Wikitext-2 数据集"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"

"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"• 影石 Insta360 全景相机全球市占率 66%"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"
